acceptable_use_policy: Data is used for law enforcement purposes only. Data is owned by Redlands CA PD and is never sold to 3rd parties.
prohibited_uses: Immigration enforcement, traffic enforcement, harassment or intimidation, usage based solely on a protected class (i.e. race, sex, religion), Personal use.
access_policy: All system access requires a valid reason and is stored indefinitely.
hotlist_policy: Hotlist hits are required to be human verified prior to action.
sharing_outbound: Cal State San Bernadino CA PD
California State University Long Beach Campus PD
RIV CO ARSON TF CA PD
San Bernardino Community College CA PD
Ventura County District Attorney's Office CA
overview: Redlands CA PD uses Flock Safety technology to capture objective evidence without compromising on individual privacy. Redlands CA PD utilizes retroactive search to solve crimes after they've occurred. Additionally, Redlands CA PD utilizes real time alerting of hotlist vehicles to capture wanted criminals. In an effort to ensure proper usage and guardrails are in place, they have made the below policies and usage statistics available to the public.
